note: YouTube Field (3.0.0-beta1) defines a scalar `youtube` field type with a validating widget and three formatters (video/thumbnail/url), plus a `youtube.settings` config object. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded): they probe documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation, do not run.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I want editors to paste a YouTube video URL onto a content type using the youtube module (not core Media). What field type do I add, and what does it store?
evals.expected_output: Add the 'YouTube video' field (field type id `youtube`). It stores the raw pasted URL in an `input` column and the extracted `video_id`; default widget `youtube`, default formatter `youtube_video`.

evals.prompt: With the youtube field module, which display formatter shows an embedded iframe player versus one that shows the video's thumbnail image?
evals.expected_output: `youtube_video` renders the embedded iframe player; `youtube_thumbnail` renders the (locally downloaded) thumbnail image. (`youtube_url` outputs the plain URL.)

evals.prompt: In the youtube module's video formatter, which settings control the player size and whether the video autoplays, and what are the size options?
evals.expected_output: `youtube_size` (options 450x315, 480x360, 640x480, 960x720, responsive, custom; custom uses youtube_width/youtube_height) and `youtube_autoplay` on the `youtube_video` formatter.

evals.prompt: How do I make youtube module embeds use privacy-enhanced (no-cookie) mode, and what domain does that switch the embed to? Give the config key.
evals.expected_output: Enable the `youtube_privacy` key on the `youtube.settings` config object (default false); it switches the embed domain from youtube.com to youtube-nocookie.com so no cookies are set until playback.

evals.prompt: Using the youtube module's thumbnail formatter, how do I apply a Drupal image style to the video thumbnail, and where does the thumbnail image come from?
evals.expected_output: Set the `image_style` setting on the `youtube_thumbnail` formatter. The thumbnail is downloaded from YouTube (img.youtube.com) and saved locally as a managed file, so an image style can be applied; remote fallbacks cannot be styled.

evals.prompt: In the youtube module global settings, which setting saves higher-resolution thumbnails and how do I force all cached thumbnails to be re-downloaded?
evals.expected_output: `youtube_thumb_hires` (default true) saves hi-res maxresdefault images (falling back to standard). The settings form's 'Refresh existing thumbnail image files' button (youtube_thumb_delete_all) deletes cached thumbnails so they are re-fetched.

evals.prompt: How does the youtube contrib field module differ from core Media's remote-video (oEmbed) source for embedding YouTube videos?
evals.expected_output: youtube stores a video as a scalar field value (URL + extracted id) directly on the host entity with its own player/thumbnail formatters; core Media's Remote video source creates a Media entity via oEmbed instead. Use youtube for a lightweight per-entity video field without the media library.

evals.prompt: Where are the global YouTube field settings configured on a Drupal site (path and route), and which permission gates that form?
evals.expected_output: At Admin -> Configuration -> Media -> YouTube Field, path /admin/config/media/youtube, route `youtube.settings`, gated by the `administer youtube` permission.
